achievements.title: Built the S3 Library Platform from Problem Discovery to Deployment
achievements.description: Conceived, designed, and shipped a library-focused SaaS platform after observing operational inefficiencies in real study spaces.
highlights: Worked across product thinking, backend architecture, frontend flows, and deployment.
Focused on practical workflows such as subscriptions, seat allocation, and branch operations.
Used the experience to understand product-market fit, validation limits, and execution trade-offs.

achievements.title: Moved from Backend Engineering into IoT and Embedded Systems
achievements.description: Expanded from software-only work into hardware-oriented engineering through structured learning and hands-on embedded projects.
highlights: Started building with Arduino, ESP8266/ESP32, sensors, and device communication workflows.
Focused on creating a stronger bridge between software engineering and real-world systems.
Used small experiments and RC car projects to reinforce practical fundamentals.

achievements.title: Built a Multi-Mode RC Car System with Real-Time Control Logic
achievements.description: Developed an RC car system with manual control, obstacle avoidance, and line-following behavior to practice embedded design and debugging.
highlights: Worked with motor control, sensors, Bluetooth communication, and modular firmware logic.
Used the project to connect theory with practical hardware troubleshooting.
Later extended the concept toward WiFi-based control using ESP8266.

achievements.title: Contributed to Production SaaS Backends and Payment Workflows
achievements.description: Delivered backend features for SaaS systems and contributed to operational workflows involving APIs, payments, and automation.
highlights: Built and maintained REST APIs for business-critical modules.
Worked with Stripe and Razorpay integrations, including secure webhook handling.
Strengthened production thinking around maintainability, structure, and reliability.

achievements.title: Built Real-Time Communication Projects Beyond Standard CRUD Applications
achievements.description: Explored event-driven design and multi-user interaction patterns through a real-time chat application.
highlights: Practiced WebSocket-based communication and state handling.
Improved understanding of responsiveness, concurrency, and event flow.
Used the project to strengthen architectural thinking beyond conventional request-response apps.
